companyNameJapanese: 信越化学工業株式会社
description: World's largest silicon wafer manufacturer with 42% global market share. Also produces PVC, rare earth magnets, photoresists, photomask blanks, and synthetic quartz. Critical supplier to all major chip manufacturers.

_externalRelationships.notes: 42% global wafer market share. Customer-specific wafer customization is key competitive advantage. Without Shin-Etsu wafers, leading-edge yields suffer.

_metadata.notes: Japan's largest chemical company by market cap. 13 analysts rate Buy. Scale in PVC and silicon wafers provides cost advantages.
